name: boschsapwebguiautomation

metadata.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation
metadata.summary: This package is used for building common automation functions for sap web gui within Bosch

documentation:
# BoschSapWebGuiAutomation

This package is used for building common automation functions for sap web gui within Bosch

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.strip_str_column
documentation:
This function is used to strip columns in str type

Args:
    upper_column(list): This is the dict that indicates which column need to be transferred into upper format
    pd_data(pd.DataFrame): This is the instance of pandas DataFrame data
    str_column_list(list):This is the list of column in str type

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: pd_data

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.load_excel_data
documentation:
This function is used to transform config data into target format

Args:
    auto_locate_header(bool): This indicates whether to locate the row index of header row
    key_header_column(str): This is the column which will be used to locate header row
    replace_na(bool): Whether to replace na value with given value
    replace_na_value(str): This is the value to fill na range
    header(int): This is the header number of DataFrame data
    file_path(str): This is the file path of Excel file
    sheet_name(str): This is the name of sheet that contains data
    upper_column_list(list): This is the columns whose values need to be in upper format
    to_dict(bool): This is the flag whether transfer data into dict format
    data_index(str): This is the column that will be index column when data need to be transferred into dict format
    used_cols(list): This is the list of column names which will be used for usecols parameter

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.load_sap_text_data
documentation:
This function is used to load data from txt file

Args:
    replace_na(bool): This indicates whether to fill NAN value
    replace_na_value(str): This is the value to fill NAN value
    file_path(str): This is the text file path
    dtype(dict | type): This is dtype which will be read as string
    key_word(str): This is the key word to locate column header
    remove_unname(bool): This is the flag whether delete column with 'Unname'
    error_log_folder_path(str): This is the path to record error log

Returns:
    dict: load_result

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.open_sap
documentation:
this function is used for open SAP system

Args:
    system_desc（str）: This is the system description

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.open_sap_with_system_code
documentation:
This function is used to open sap with system code

Args:
    system_code(str): POE,PRP ....

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.check_file_download_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether file has been downloaded successfully

Args:
    file_name(str): This is the file name of file that will be saved in save folder
    save_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of save folder

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.check_done_indicators_complete
documentation:
This function is used to check whether all data has been downloaded

Args:
    done_file_path(str): This is the done file path
    key_word(str): This is the key word to show type
    wait_time(int): This is the wait time duration for checking whether sap data downloaded

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.execute_created_script
documentation:
This function is used to log in sap and execute related SAP guiXT script


Args:
    wait_time(int): This is the time interval to wait sap job done
    open_sap_method(str): system_description or system_code
    check_method(str): done_indicator or file_download
    save_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of downloaded files
    file_name(str): This is the file name of downloaded file
    script_file_path(str): This is the file path of sap script
    done_file_path(str): This is the done indicator file path
    sys_desc(str): This is the file path of script
    is_paste(bool): Whether paste content to SAP
    paste_content_list(list): he content list need to be pasted to SAP
    system_code(str): POE,PRP ....

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.generate_multiple_input_sap_script
documentation:
This function is used to generate sap scripts for multiple input of company codes, document number and so on

Args:
    script_header(str): This is the script header for script function description
    set_value_script(str): This is the set value part sap script
    multiple_input_list(list): This is the list of multiple input values

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.data_process_functions.create_pivot_table
documentation:
This function is used to create pivot tables

Args:
    target_workbook(Book): This is the workbook to create pivot tables
    data_source_sheet_name(str): This is the name of data source sheet
    pivot_table_sheet_name(str): This is the name of pivot table worksheet
    pt_name(str): This is the name of pivot table
    pt_rows(list):This is the list of pivot rows
    pt_cols(list): This is the list of pivot columns
    pt_filters(list): This is the lisf of pivot filters
    pt_fields(list(list)): This is the list of pivot fields which will be show in pivot table data area.
                           e.g. [['Document Number', 'Document Number Count', win32c.xlCount, '0']]
    pt_table_location(list): This is the location of pivot table starts
    pt_filter_location(list): This is the location of pivot filter starts

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.get_sap_web_gui_functions
documentation: This function is used to initial WebSapCommonFunctions
from selenium.webdriver.firefox.firefox_profile import FirefoxProfile

classes.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.__init__
documentation: This function is used to initial basic parameters

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.clear_save_folder
documentation:
This function is used to clear save folder

Args:
    save_folder_path (str): This is the folder path to save downloaded files

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_file_download_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether file has been downloaded successfully

Args:
    file_name(str): This is the file name of file that will be saved in save folder
    save_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of save folder

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.initial_browser
documentation:
This function is used to initial FireFox browser

Args:
    service_log_path(str): This is the path of service log
    is_private(bool): Whether to open a private window
    has_save_folder(bool):This is the flag whether to set save folder path
    save_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of save folder
    has_proxy(bool): This is whether to use proxy when open browser
    proxy_area(str): This is the proxy setting for network.proxy.autoconfig_url
    firefox_binary_location(str): This is the path of firefox.exe
    is_headless(bool): This indicates whether to use headless mode to execute automation task
    geckodriver_binary_location(str): This is the path of geckodriver.exe
Returns:
    Tuple[Firefox,WebDriverWait]: [self.browser, self.wait]

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_page_loaded
documentation: This function is used to wait page loaded

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.create_and_switch_tab
documentation:
This function is used to create new tab and switch to it

Args:
    close_pre_tab(bool): This indicates whether to close history tab
    pre_tab_index(int): This is the history tab index
    web_link(str): This is the link where browser will navigate to
    tab_index(int): This is the index of tab whose index starts from 0. if close_pre_tab is True, this is the tab index after close history tab

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_element_presence_by_css_selector
documentation:
This function is used to wait element by css selector

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_element_invisible_by_css_selector
documentation:
This function is used to wait element by css selector

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_invisibility_of_loading_window
documentation:
This function is used to wait loading window to disappear

Args:
    wait_time_before_check(int):This is the wait time before check invisibility of loading window

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_login_error
documentation: This function is used to check whether password is correct

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.login_sap_with_password
documentation:
This function is used to log in sap with username and password

Args:
    sap_user(str): This is the username of current sap system
    sap_password(str):This is the password of sap user

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.login_web_sap
documentation:
This function is used to wait sap web page loaded before input t-code

sleep is the buffer time for assuring page loaded

Args:
    sap_system_name(str): This is the sap system name
    sap_user(str): This is the username of current sap system
    sap_password(str):This is the password of sap user

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.switch_iframe
documentation:
This function is used to switch iframe if there are iframes within html

Args:
    loop_check(bool): Whether to loop check iframe exists
    iframe_list (list): This is the list of iframe css selectors or names

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_t_code
documentation:
This function is used to input t-code and click enter

Args:
    iframe_list(list): This is the list of iframe name
    t_code(str): This is the t-code of task

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.clear_single_input_field
documentation:
This function is used to clear single input field

Args:
    is_enter(bool): This is the flag whether to press Enter key
    css_selector(str): This is the css selector of target input field

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.fill_input_filed_with_single_value
documentation:
This function is used to input single value to single input field

Args:
    tip_css_selector(str): This is the css selector of target tip/suggestion
    is_enter(bool): This is the flag whether to press Enter key
    is_tab(bool): This is the flag whether to press Tab key
    single_value(str): This is the single value
    css_selector(str): This is the css selector of target input field
    click_tip(bool): Whether to wait and click opinion
    target_element(WebElement): This is the target element

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_filed_single_value
documentation:
This function is used to input single field value in SE16.

Args:
    field_index(int): This is the index of field. e.g. 1,2
    is_enter(bool): This is the flag whether to press enter
    is_tab(bool): This is the flag whether to press tab
    need_click_tip(bool): This is the flag whether to click tip
    field_title(str): This is the title of field
    field_value(str): This is the value of field

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.click_radio_checkbox
documentation:
This function is used to click radio or checkbox in SE16.

Args:
    radio_checkbox_title(str): This is the title of radio or checkbox

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_button_popup_and_click
documentation:
This function is used to check element exist and click.

Args:
    button_title(str): This is the css selector of button
    try_times(int): This is the times to try

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.find_input_element_by_title
documentation:
This function is used to find input element by title

Args:
    input_index(int):  This is the index of input element
    title(str): This is the title of input field

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_layout
documentation:
This function is used to input layout name

documentation: This function is used to click execute button to load data page

documentation:
This function is used to press keyboard shortcut

Args:

    wait_css_selector(str): This is the css selector to wait before press shortcut keys

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.activate_context_click
documentation:
This function is used to execute context click

documentation:
This function is used to pop up download Excel file window

Args:

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.select_sap_layout
documentation:
This function is used to select sap layout

Args:
    layout_name(str): This is the name of layout
    shortcut_list(list): This is the list of shortcut keys that will activate select layout window

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.remove_existed_file_with_file_name
documentation:
This function is used to remove files with incorrect file name

Args:
    file_name(str): This is the file name of file that will be saved in save folder

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_download_excel_file_name
documentation:
This function used to input excel download file name

    file_name(str): This is the file name of Excel file

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.determine_dynamic_selection_button_index
documentation:
This function is used to dynamically determine multiple selection button index according to user input

Args:
    section_name(str): This the section name
    multi_selection_button_index(int): This is the index of multiple selection button in G/L account selection or other section

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_multiple_selection
documentation:
This function is used to input multiple selection for company code, gl account and so on

Args:
    paste_method(str): This is the copy and paste method for multiple input. e.g. clipboard or file
    tab_index(int): This is the tab index of multiple selection
    section_name(str): This the section name
    multi_selection_button_index(int): This is the index of multiple selection button in G/L account selection
    input_css_path(str): This is the css selector to locate first input element
    value_list(list): This is the values need to be input
    clear_section_data(bool): This is the indicator whether delete all section data before pasting new values
    get_screenshot(bool): This is the flag that indicates whether to save screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.input_multiple_selection_with_index
documentation:
This function is used to input multiple selection for company code, gl account and so on

Args:
    paste_method(str): This is the copy and paste method for multiple input. e.g. clipboard or file
    tab_index(int): This is the tab index of multiple selection
    multiple_selection_index(int): This is the order of Multiple selection button which starts from 1
    input_css_path(str): This is the css selector to locate first input element
    value_list(list): This is the values need to be input
    clear_section_data(bool): This is the indicator whether delete all section data before pasting new values
    get_screenshot(bool): This is the flag that indicates whether to save screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.copy_paste_values
documentation:
This function is used to copy and paste values

Args:
    wait_alert(bool): This indicates whether to click copy button and wait paster warning window pop up
    input_css_selector(str): This is the css selector to locate first input element
    value_list(list): This is the values need to be input
    is_enter(bool): Whether to press enter key

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.copy_paste_values_by_file
documentation:
This function is used to copy and paste values by uploading file

Args:
    value_list(list): This is the values need to be input

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_multiple_selection_switch
documentation:
This function is used to wait multiple selection tab switch complete

Args:
    tab_index(int): This is the tab index of multiple selection

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.click_or_input_by_css_selector
documentation:
Click or input element by using css selector to find it

Args:
    css_selector(str): This is css selector
    action_type(str): click or input
    content(str): This is the content to be input

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.move_to_and_click_element
documentation:
This function is used to move mouse to element and click

Args:
    css_selector: This is css selector of element

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.click_or_input_by_element
documentation:
Click or input element by using css selector to find it

Args:
    css_element(WebElement): This is css element
    action_type(str): click or input
    content(str): This is the content to be input

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.click_element_by_key_word
documentation:
This function is used to click element by key word when there is no effective css selector

Args:
    wait_css_selector(str): This is the css selector to wait before click target element
    target_elements_css_selector(str): This is the css selector for all siblings elements of target element(contains target element)
    key_word(str): This is the key word to identify target element
    click_type(str): single or double
    search_method(str): accurate or blur
    click_method(str):css_selector or element

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.click_by_selenium_webdriver
documentation:
This function is used to click element by selenium original click

Args:
    element_css_selector(str): This the is css selector of target element

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.get_screenshot
documentation:
This function is used to get screenshot of current webpage

Args:
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_target_text_appearance
documentation:
Args:
    case_sensitive(bool): This indicates whether to consider the upper and lower case of text
    check_method(str): This is the method to check target text.  e.g. equal, contain, startswith, endswith
    text_tag(str): This is the status which is used to describe situation or result when target text occurs
    target_text(str): This is the target text to detect
    text_css_selector(str): This is the css selector of text element
    after_text_css_selector(str): This is the css selector of element if there is no target text
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when target text occurs
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when target text occurs
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_window_switch_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether there are temp elements before loading target element

Args:
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when there is an error window popping up
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when there is an error occurred
    target_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates data is loaded successfully
    before_target_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates that there is temp element
    before loading target element
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_data_load_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether there are errors when loading data by clicking execution button

Args:
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when there is an error window popping up
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when there is an error occurred
    success_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates data loaded successfully
    error_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates that there is an error or no data
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot

methods.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_file_upload_confirmation_dialog
documentation:
This function is used to wait file upload confirmation dialog window and click ok button

  click_method(str): This is the method to click element

documentation:
This function is used to click store business attachment selection and upload related documents

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.create_error_log
documentation:
This function is used to create error log when there is an error occurred during RPA operation

Args:
    error_log_folder_path(str): This is the path of folder to save error logs
    error_info(str): This is the error message that need to be added to error log

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.auto_close_messagebox
documentation: This function is used to close message box if user do not click ok to close window

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.pop_up_messagebox
documentation:
This function is used for popping up message for users

```
param message

This is the information that RPA will show to users

param duration

This is the duration the message box will show
```

Args:

: message(str): This is the information that RPA will show to users
  auto_close(bool): This is the flag whether to auto close window if user doesn't close window
  duration(int): This is the duration for window to show

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.pop_up_confirm_messagebox
documentation:
This function is used for popping up message for users

```
param message

This is the information that RPA will show to users
```

Args:

: message(str): This is the information that RPA will show to users

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.create_excel_sample_result
documentation:
This function is used to create sample result in html format

Args:
    normal_sample_result_list(list): This is the sample list out of highest_sample_result_list

documentation:
This function is used to send emails

functions.name: BoschSapWebGuiAutomation.helper_functions.smb_copy_file_local_to_remote
documentation:
This function is used to copy local file to public folder

Args:
    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_ip(str): This is the ip address of the public folder, which can be same as server name
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    local_file_path(str): This is the local file path
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name

documentation:
This function is used to store file to public folder

    password(str): This is the password
    server_ip(str): This is the ip address of the public folder, which can be same as server name
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com

    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
